results.description: L2 module filenames must match their primary struct/trait name (with suffix tolerance)

violations.message: L2 file 'main\src\core\handler\event_emitting_handler.rs' types ["TestEcho", "CollectingBus", "FailingHandler", "SkippingHandler", "SlowHandler"] don't match filename 'EventEmittingHandler'
violations.fix_hint: Rename file to match primary type, or rename type to include 'EventEmittingHandler'

results.description: Types in L2 modules must be name-cohesive (SRP enforcement)

violations.message: Type 'CollectingBus' is not cohesive with primary type 'TestEcho'
violations.fix_hint: Move 'CollectingBus' to its own file 'collecting_bus.rs'

violations.message: Type 'FailingHandler' is not cohesive with primary type 'TestEcho'
violations.fix_hint: Move 'FailingHandler' to its own file 'failing_handler.rs'

violations.message: Type 'SkippingHandler' is not cohesive with primary type 'TestEcho'
violations.fix_hint: Move 'SkippingHandler' to its own file 'skipping_handler.rs'

violations.message: Type 'SlowHandler' is not cohesive with primary type 'TestEcho'
violations.fix_hint: Move 'SlowHandler' to its own file 'slow_handler.rs'

results.description: Suggest Builder pattern for complex structs (advisory)

violations.message: Struct 'StageFailed' has 5 fields (0 optional) - consider Builder pattern
violations.fix_hint: Add 'StageFailedBuilder' with fluent setters

results.description: application_type must be defined in project metadata
mod.rs must contain only module declarations and re-exports — no struct/impl/fn logic

violations.message: mod.rs contains logic: type definitions (struct/enum/trait/impl) and function definitions
violations.expected: Only module declarations (pub mod) and re-exports (pub use)
violations.fix_hint: Move logic (structs, impls, functions) out of mod.rs into named files; mod.rs should only have `pub mod` and `pub use` statements

results.description: Sibling files sharing a common prefix must be grouped into a subdirectory module (e.g., check_runner.rs + check_result.rs → check/runner.rs + check/result.rs)

violations.message: 2 files in main/src/core/event/ share prefix 'noop': noop_event_bus, noop_event_publisher — group into main/src/core/event/noop/
violations.fix_hint: Create a subdirectory named after the shared prefix and move files into it (e.g., `check_runner.rs` → `check/runner.rs`)

results.description: Every pub/pub(crate) fn in L2 layers must have an inline unit test (#[cfg(test)] block with #[test])

violations.message: L2 unit test coverage: 75% (3/4 functions have inline tests)
violations.expected: 100% of L2/ functions with inline unit tests
violations.fix_hint: Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests { #[test] fn test_<name>() { ... } } to each core/ source file

violations.message: Function 'new' in 'main/src/core/handler/in_process_handler_registry.rs' has no inline unit test — file has no #[cfg(test)] block
violations.fix_hint: Add a `#[cfg(test)] mod tests { #[test] fn test_<fn_name>() { ... } }` block to the source file

results.description: Each pub type/trait in api/ must be in its own standalone file with the file stem matching the snake_case name

violations.message: api/ file 'main/src/api/handler/traits/handler/factory.rs' contains `pub trait HandlerFactory` but the file stem 'factory' does not match — expected 'api/handler_factory.rs'
violations.fix_hint: Rename the file to 'api/handler_factory.rs' (matching the snake_case of 'HandlerFactory'). Update the parent mod.rs to reference the new filename and update any `use` paths across the crate.

violations.message: api/ file 'main/src/api/handler/traits/handler/registry.rs' contains `pub trait HandlerRegistry` but the file stem 'registry' does not match — expected 'api/handler_registry.rs'
violations.fix_hint: Rename the file to 'api/handler_registry.rs' (matching the snake_case of 'HandlerRegistry'). Update the parent mod.rs to reference the new filename and update any `use` paths across the crate.

results.description: api/ must contain error types — either a flat api/error/ subdirectory or domain-grouped api/<domain>/errors/ directories; at least one must exist

violations.message: No error directory found in api project root — expected api/error/ or api/{theme}/errors/
violations.fix_hint: Create main/src/api/error/ with domain error type definitions
